'''âch-f-g-dh''' ('''kachafgedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tumulate|tumulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tumulate|tumulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-f-g-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kachafgedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafgedhoko|thichafgedhoko]] || [[word:jichafgedhoko|jichafgedhoko]] || [[word:shichafgedhoko|shichafgedhoko]] || [[word:kichafgedhoko|kichafgedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchafgedhoko|thuthuchafgedhoko]] || [[word:jujuchafgedhoko|jujuchafgedhoko]] || [[word:shushuchafgedhoko|shushuchafgedhoko]] || [[word:kukuchafgedhoko|kukuchafgedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
